name: 💿 ⋆ Till | Modern AU
description:
ALIEN STAGE | TILL

modern AU Till bot because that final round gave me depression for weeks. First bot of 2025 !!

AnyPOV, unestablished relationship

You can be Ivan if you want, give ‘em the ending they deserved

He’s a 23 year old popstar, and the story starts on his bday celebration hosted by his music label, ANAKT Corp.

Disclaimer

Considering the Alien Stage Series didn’t have any dialogue whatsoever and only focused on visual / musical story-telling, I wasn’t quite sure how to write his speech style and overall character in much depth as I had hoped to. Feel free to leave any suggestions on what portions you’d like improved though! I made this guy in less than an hour so he might be buggy. Idk.

JJLM issues (e.g. speaking for {{user}}, speeding things up on the story, overly sexual behavior etc.) are not within my control, try tweaking with your prompts to resolve these on your own !!

I made Mizi & Sua girlfriends here, use them as NPCs if u want
creator: Seojuparty
